headers: Hazard if LLM gets it wrong
rows: Door opens at speed → occupant ejection, child fall-out
Block if speed > 5 km/h; child-lock state respected
Trunk-open at speed → crash, debris, visibility
Anti-pinch sensor must override; voice never bypasses
"Open the sunroof" in rain / car-wash / high speed
Water ingress, wind injury, structural noise distraction
ODD checks: rain sensor, speed, wash mode
"Apply / release parking brake" (EPB) — see prior turn
Loss of standstill on slope, dynamic brake at speed
Hard allow-list: voice EPB only at v=0, gear P/N, confirmed
"Turn off headlights" / "Turn off hazards" while driving at night / emergency
Block; reverse the request — explain rather than execute
Two-stage confirmation; cluster banner; ASIL boundary respected
"Change drive mode to Sport / Off-Road / Snow"
Wrong traction model on current surface → loss of control
Context-aware: speed, gear, surface estimate; confirm
Beyond cockpit ODD — LLM must not initiate AD
Hard block; route only via ADAS HMI which has its own ASIL D
"Lock the doors now" during a crash / emergency egress
Crash signal & door-handle override always win
HV exposure during service, thermal event
Lockout in Service Mode, plug-state checks
"Recline driver seat" / move seat while driving
Driver loses pedal reach, airbag pose violated
Block on driver seat above 0 km/h; passenger seat with limits
Send eCall / cancel eCall by LLM
False emergency calls or suppressed real ones
LLM may suggest ; cannot initiate or cancel eCall
